Text.Page:
Crafting for the War Effort

Support the federation war effort by tailoring cloth armor!
A researcher in Scythera Fae has discovered a new strengthening solution for cloth armor. Will you travel there and bring some back for our crafters?
Is this what Kunar wants for the crafters in Kaiator? I spent a lot of time developing it. If it helps our soldiers, he may certainly have some.
Thank you, <PCNAME>. Take this design for your efforts.
